# FoundOurMarket

> Premium global marketplace — curated electronics, home, fitness and more, delivered worldwide with secure checkout and trusted sellers.

FoundOurMarket is an international shopping destination bringing together quality products from around the world in one place.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Featured products, categories, and deals.
- [Search](/search): Browse and filter the full product catalog.
- [Deals](/deals): Current discounts and flash sales.
- [Blog](/blog): Stories, guides, and editorial from FoundOurMarket.
- [Track Order](/track): Look up order and shipment status.
- [Compare](/compare): Compare products side by side.
- [Help](/help): Support, FAQs, and customer assistance.

## Optional

- [Shipping](/pages/shipping): Shipping options and delivery times.
- [Returns](/pages/returns): Return and refund policy.
